name: muscle
description: MUSCLE - Self-learning code review that gets smarter with every task. Project-local memory always stays primary; related-project lessons and model packs are optional overlays. Commands: /muscle:review, /muscle:pressure, /muscle:rescue, /muscle:setup, /muscle:check, /muscle:history, /muscle:probe, /muscle:diagnosis, /muscle:lifeline, /muscle:kb-stats, /muscle:settings-show, /muscle:settings-api-key, /muscle:settings-review, /muscle:settings-model, /muscle:memory-related, /muscle:memory-import-project, /muscle:memory-history, /muscle:model-status, /muscle:model-history, /muscle:model-select, /muscle:model-pack-install, /muscle:model-pack-submit, /muscle:long-eval-reports, /muscle:long-eval-benchmark, /muscle:init, /muscle:enable, /muscle:disable, /muscle:status, /muscle:optimize-host-docs

install.script: bash -c 'set -e; INSTALL_DIR="${HOME}/.muscle/src"; if command -v muscle &>/dev/null; then echo "[MUSCLE] CLI already installed"; elif [ -f "${INSTALL_DIR}/tools/muscle/pyproject.toml" ]; then echo "[MUSCLE] Repo found, installing CLI..."; (cd "${INSTALL_DIR}" && uv pip install -e . 2>/dev/null || python -m pip install -e . --quiet) && echo "[MUSCLE] CLI installed successfully"; else echo "[MUSCLE] Cloning repository..."; git clone --branch main --depth 1 https://github.com/LivingEthos/muscle.git "${INSTALL_DIR}" && (cd "${INSTALL_DIR}" && (uv pip install -e . 2>/dev/null || python -m pip install -e . --quiet)) && mkdir -p "${HOME}/.local/bin" && [ ! -f "${HOME}/.local/bin/muscle" ] && ln -sf "${INSTALL_DIR}/.venv/bin/muscle" "${HOME}/.local/bin/muscle" 2>/dev/null || true && echo "[MUSCLE] CLI installed successfully"; fi'
install.description: Installs the MUSCLE CLI backend (muscle) if not already installed
